ModMetadata.Name: {{Mod Display Name}}
ModMetadata.Author: SixFive7
ModMetadata.Description:
[h1]{{Mod Display Name}}[/h1]
{{Tagline: same sentence as the GitHub repo description and README intro paragraph, in BBCode. One sentence describing the mod in its feature-complete state.}}
[h2]Features[/h2]
[h3]{{Feature 1 Title}}[/h3] {{One or two sentences per feature. Use [list][*]...[/list] for bullet points, [b]bold[/b] for setting names.}}
[h3]{{Feature 2 Title}}[/h3] {{Repeat for each feature.}}
[h3]Settings[/h3]
All features are configurable via the mod settings panel.
[b]Client settings[/b] (personal preference, each player sets independently): [list] [*][b]{{Setting Name}}[/b] (default {{Default}}): {{Description}} [/list]
[b]Server settings[/b] (the server's value controls gameplay for everyone): [list] [*][b]{{Setting Name}}[/b] (default {{Default}}): {{Description}} [/list]
[h2]Compatibility[/h2]
[b]Requires:[/b] [list] [*][url=https://docs.bepinex.dev/]BepInEx[/url] [*][url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad[/url] [/list]
[b]All players[/b] on a server must have {{Mod Display Name}} installed. Matching mod versions are enforced during the connection handshake automatically.
[b]Dedicated servers[/b] need the same BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad + {{ModCodeName}} setup installed server-side.
[h2]Reporting Issues[/h2] If you run into a bug or something behaves unexpectedly, please open an issue on [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/issues]GitHub[/url]. Please include the mod name in the title so reports can be triaged. Steam comment notifications don't always come through, so GitHub is the reliable way to make sure a report is seen.
[h2]Credits[/h2] {{Optional; delete the section when the mod is original. When present, one bullet per predecessor or contributor with a Workshop link and a short credit line.}}
[url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/tree/master/Mods/{{ModCodeName}}]Source Code on GitHub[/url]
[h2]License[/h2] Licensed under the [url=https://github.com/SixFive7/StationeersPlus/blob/master/LICENSE]Apache License 2.0[/url]. Attribution required; see the LICENSE and NOTICE files at the repository root.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v0.1.0: Initial release - Describe the first public release here. Plain text only, no BBCode. Steam Workshop renders ChangeLog as plain text.
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: {{Mod Display Name}} {{Tagline: same sentence as GitHub description and About.xml opener, in Unity rich text.}} Features: - {{Feature 1}} - {{Feature 2}} Settings: Server settings control gameplay for all players; client settings are personal. Requires: BepInEx + StationeersLaunchPad. All players, including dedicated servers, need the same setup.
